subtitles.original: Oh, money boost. Money boost is good.

I didn't say anything when I muted, by the way.

subtitles.original: I was gonna go boil some water for noodles, but...
subtitles.english: I was gonna go boil some water for noodles, but...

subtitles.original: I think I have enough wheat. Maybe...
subtitles.english: I think I have enough wheat. Maybe...

subtitles.original: ...maybe I'll just go carrots because they're sold at the same price.
subtitles.english: ...maybe I'll just go carrots because they're sold at the same price.

subtitles.english: It's just easier to do the same crop.

subtitles.english: And carrots are better yield, yeah!

subtitles.original: Let's go make some pumpkin pie. Carrot and pumpkin pie.
